prompt: Plan a non-simple public workflow change. Inspect first, resolve discoverable facts, enter Grill for any remaining material user decision, and confirm a concise Decision Summary before the final plan. Do not implement or release anything.
must: auto-enter Grill for a non-simple plan after evidence has resolved discoverable facts
ask only material user decisions and confirm a concise Decision Summary before the final plan
treat confirmation as acceptance of planning decisions only
must_not: ask for repository facts the agent can discover
treat confirmation as implementation or release authority
add lifecycle packets or persistent state
evidence: Static Codex-first Plan ask-predicate contract; it does not prove live model behavior.
